hyperedges.label: CI Security Pipeline: CI workflow runs bundler-audit and brakeman, enforced by CONTRIBUTING and SECURITY policy
Test fixtures collectively represent domain model: users author jams and games
Core platform value: game jams + game distribution + social layer form the Jammer product
Jammer Branding Asset Family (multiple color/background variants of the same network-globe logo)
FASIE Sponsorship Branding (logo images and locale text referencing Foundation for Assistance to Innovations)
Jam Participants Achievement Badge Progression (bronze ×25, silver ×50)
Rated Games achievement tier set (bronze ×10, silver ×100, gold ×1000) — flame/shield icon, rewards users who rate many games
Game Rated achievement tier set (bronze ×10, silver ×100, gold ×1000) — star polygon icon, rewards developers whose games receive many ratings
Games Uploaded achievement tier set (silver ×10, gold ×50) — upload arrow icon, rewards users who upload many games
